{
  Edict.Generated.AddEdict.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Edict.Generated
{
    public static class EdictServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddEdict(
            this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services)
        {
            var routes = new global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<
                global::System.Type, global::Edict.Core.CommandRoute>
            {
                [typeof(global::Sample.CancelOrder)] = new global::Edict.Core.CommandRoute(typeof(global::Sample.CancelOrder), typeof(global::Sample.IOrderGrain), "Sample.OrderGrain", command => ((global::Sample.CancelOrder)command).OrderId),
                [typeof(global::Sample.PlaceOrder)] = new global::Edict.Core.CommandRoute(
                    typeof(global::Sample.PlaceOrder),
                    typeof(global::Sample.IOrderGrain),
                    "Sample.OrderGrain",
                    command => ((global::Sample.PlaceOrder)command).OrderId,
                    (command, activity) =>
                    {
                        var typedCommand = (global::Sample.PlaceOrder)command;
                        activity?.SetTag("edict.placeorder.sku", typedCommand.Sku);
                    }),
            };

            global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions
                .AddSingleton<global::Edict.Core.CommandRouteResolver>(
                    services, new global::Edict.Core.CommandRouteResolver(routes));
            global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions
                .AddSingleton<global::Edict.Core.IEdictSender, global::Edict.Core.EdictSender>(
                    services);
            global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions
                .AddSingleton<global::System.Diagnostics.ActivitySource>(
                    services, global::Edict.Core.EdictDiagnostics.ActivitySource);

            return services;
        }
    }
}
,
  Sample.OrderGrain.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Sample
{
    /// <summary>Generated Orleans grain interface for OrderGrain.</summary>
    public partial interface IOrderGrain : global::Edict.Core.IEdictCommandHandler
    {
    }

    public partial class OrderGrain : IOrderGrain
    {
        public override global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::Edict.Abstractions.CommandResult> Dispatch(
            global::Edict.Abstractions.Command command)
        {
            return command switch
            {
                global::Sample.CancelOrder c => this.Handle(c),
                global::Sample.PlaceOrder c => this.Handle(c),
                _ => throw new global::Edict.Core.UnroutableCommandException(
                    command.GetType()),
            };
        }
    }
}
